articles.title: How many constituencies can a candidate contest from? | TN Elections with The Hindu
articles.description:
In the 2001 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, AIADMK supremo Jayalalithaa filed nominations from four seats and 
all four nominations were rejected. Protests erupted. The ruling government was accused of conspiracy.
And ten years later, the Supreme Court pulled up that leader sharply. That leader was AIADMK supremo Jayalalithaa. How many constituencies can a candidate legally contest from in India?

topStories.description: The United States has offered a reward of up to $10 million or Rs 92,47,48,000 at current exchange rates for information on Iran's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, and several other senior...

topStories.title: Haryana Rajya Sabha polls: Congress MLAs reach Himachal Pradesh to prevent cross-voting
topStories.description: After CLP meet, about 30 MLAs leave for Shimla; party insiders say the move is meant to keep the flock together ahead of three-cornered election; Congress holds 37 seats and needs 31 votes to send its candidate

topStories.title: Brazil’s jailed ex-President Jair Bolsonaro hospitalised with bronchopneumonia; condition serious
topStories.description: The 70-year-old was taken to the hospital early Friday (March 13) after experiencing high fever, chills and a drop in oxygen saturation, doctors said.

topStories.title: Sheriff in Nancy Guthrie case believes they know kidnapper's motive
topStories.description: The 84-year-old mother of US TV presenter Savannah Guthrie was kidnapped 41 days ago.

topStories.title: Ukraine and allies fear easing Russian sanctions will prolong war
topStories.description: Ukraine's president says the US decision "certainly does not help achieve peace".

topStories.title: Iran’s arsenal power crushed? US Defence Secy Pete Hegseth claims ‘missiles down 90%, drones down 95%’
topStories.description: Speaking at a Pentagon press conference, Hegseth said: “Iran has no air defenses. Iran has no air force. Iran has no navy. Their missiles, their missile launchers and drones are being destroyed…”

dailyNews.title: Opposition leaders press government, Lok Sabha Speaker to revoke the suspension of 8 MPs
dailyNews.description: The eight MPs, including seven from the Congress, have been barred from attending the remainder of the Budget Session

dailyNews.title: ‘You don’t need to worry about it’: Pete Hegseth on Iran's Hormuz shipping threat
dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz has come under global focus as tensions rise following joint strikes by United States and Israel on Iran. Commercial ships in the strait and the Persian Gulf have recently faced missile and drone attack risks linked to Iran.

dailyNews.title: ‘Improper purpose’: US federal judge quashes subpoenas against Jerome Powell, says 'govt tried to pressure on rates'
dailyNews.description: The Judge wrote that evidence suggests that the government served the subpoenas ‘on the Board to pressure its Chair into voting for lower interest rates or resigning’

dailyNews.title: Cuba confirms talks with Trump officials; President Miguel Diaz-Canel seeks solutions amid severe energy crisis
dailyNews.description: Oil shipments from Venezuela to Cuba were halted after the United States attacked Venezuela and arrested President Nicolás Maduro, deepening Cuba’s energy crisis.

dailyNews.title: Menstrual leave law not in women’s best interest: SC
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court declined to mandate menstrual leave, citing potential job market issues, and urged the government to consider a uniform policy.

dailyNews.title: Chipotle announces BOGO burritos on Friday, 13 March, in US. But here's the catch to avail the offer — details here
dailyNews.description: Chipotle Mexican Grill is offering a limited-time BOGO deal on March 13, from 3-4 p.m. Customers must show a tattoo to redeem the offer, which allows one free item for every purchased entrée of equal or higher value, capped at five items per bill.

dailyNews.title: Rahul Gandhi's big Kanshi Ram claim in UP Dalit outreach: 'Nehru would've made him Congress CM'
dailyNews.description: BSP under Kanshi Ram's protege, ex-CM Mayawati has tense relationship with Congress and SP, which are focusing on social justice agenda ahead of assembly polls

dailyNews.title: All six crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
dailyNews.description: The US Central Command says all six crew members died after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

dailyNews.title: Cuba says it will release 51 prisoners in the coming days
dailyNews.description: Havana says it is in talks with Washington as no fuel has entered the island in three months.

dailyNews.title: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth claims Iran’s new Supreme Leader ‘likely wounded and disfigured’
dailyNews.description: Hegseth criticized Khamenei’s first statement for being written rather than delivered via video or audio and said there was no proof of his condition.

dailyNews.title: US, Israel hit more than 15,000 targets in Iran war: Pentagon
dailyNews.description: The United States and Israel have struck more than 15,000 targets since launching a war against Iran last month, US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Defiance on display: Iran President Pezeshkian meets people on Tehran streets amid Trump warning - Video
dailyNews.description: Due to the ongoing conflict, to date, 2000 people have been killed, most of them in Iran, but many also in Lebanon and a growing number in the Gulf, reports say

dailyNews.title: Boasberg blocks subpoenas against Fed Chair Jerome Powell
dailyNews.description: Judge Boasberg described the effort as an attempt to pressure Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell into lowering interest rates or resigning.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth announces Pentagon probe into deadly strike on Iranian school
dailyNews.description: Pentagon investigates deadly Iran strike that Tehran regime claims killed 168+ children at school by IRGC military site. U.S. investigation is underway.

dailyNews.title: James Carville tells Stephen A Smith Democrats 'do not know how to talk to young men'
dailyNews.description: James Carville asked Stephen A. Smith how Democrats can reconnect with young men during a podcast discussion about political messaging and economic priorities.

dailyNews.title: Sugary drinks linked to higher anxiety risk in certain age group, study finds
dailyNews.description: New study reveals that teens who drink more sugary beverages have a 34% higher risk of anxiety disorders. Nutritionists share insights on the potential link.

dailyNews.title: Fingerprint and photo scans to be fully enforced for American travelers headed to one continent
dailyNews.description: Starting April 10, American travelers to Europe must provide fingerprint scans and photos at borders. France, Italy, UK and 26 other countries are implementing the system.

topStories.title: Trump-backed voter ID bill faces GOP resistance as Tillis vows to stop it
topStories.description: Senate Republicans are ready for a floor battle over a voter ID bill despite internal divisions, with Sens. Thom Tillis , R-N.C., and Lisa Murkowski, R-Alaska, in opposition.

topStories.title: Trump-Iran Timeline: Key Moments Leading Up to War
topStories.description: President Trump’s aggressive stance toward Iran, during his first term and since returning to office last year, is key to understanding the conflict.

topStories.title: Trump’s Move to Seize Oil Tankers Costs the U.S. Tens of Millions of Dollars
topStories.description: Although President Trump said seizing tankers would be a financial boon, the cost of maintaining just one aging ship has already reached $47 million.

topStories.title: Pete Hegseth Says ‘the Sooner David Ellison’ Buys CNN, ‘the Better’
topStories.description: The remarks fueled concerns that CNN’s prospective new owner may shift its coverage in a Trump-friendly direction.

topStories.title: Cuba Acknowledges Talks with Trump Officials For the First Time
topStories.description: President Miguel Díaz-Canel, whose country is rapidly running out of fuel, said the talks were based on “respect for the political systems of both countries.”

topStories.title: His Harvard Lab Was Thriving. Then Came the Cuts.
topStories.description: Will Mair, who studies aging, lost almost all his research funds when the White House cracked down on Harvard. He was wholly unprepared for the upheaval that followed.

topStories.title: When a President Gets Addicted to Regime Change
topStories.description: Venezuela gave Trump a taste of success. This isn’t the first time an American president has gotten hooked on overthrowing foreign governments.

dailyNews.title: Trump posts renderings showing Kennedy Center exterior after planned renovation
dailyNews.description: The Kennedy Center is set to close for two years on July 4.

dailyNews.title: Cuba confirms talks with the U.S. are underway
dailyNews.description: Cuban leaders say talks with the U.S. are underway as President Trump continues to allude to a change in the island's leadership. CBS News Miami's Morgan Rynor reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs Jones Act waiver amid rising fuel prices, White House says
dailyNews.description: Easing the century-old shipping law could help lower fuel prices as the Iran war pushes crude oil near $100 a barrel, experts say.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Trump can't 'drill, baby, drill' his way out of this Iran-inspired oil crisis: Experts
dailyNews.description: Oil prices have skyrocketed in the days since President Donald Trump's war on Iran began.

dailyNews.title: Oil closes above $100 for second day as market shrugs off U.S. measures to reduce prices during Iran war
dailyNews.description: Traders are continuing to monitor developments in the Middle East. Overnight, Trump hinted that an end to the conflict was not imminent.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariffs: Refunds to companies should go to workers as bonuses, raises, Greer says
dailyNews.description: The United States government could end up paying $165 billion of more in refunds for Trump's IEEPA tariffs that the Supreme Court ruled were illegal.

dailyNews.title: Trump touted falling gas prices but now says 'we make a lot of money' as they go up
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says all the time that gas prices are dropping on his watch, but with the Iran war, he says rising oil costs are good for America.

dailyNews.description: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'
